objective: Create a same day staffing recovery plan for a missed shift.

context.scenario: A front of house team member called off before a dinner rush.
context.operator_need: manager needs a recovery plan before peak service

authority_boundary: The output may not directly change the schedule.
The output may not contact employees without approval.
The output may not approve overtime without manager review.
acceptance_criteria: The plan identifies the uncovered role and time window.
The plan gives at least two recovery options.
The plan respects role coverage and labor constraints.
The plan explains when a manager should intervene.
The plan separates recommendation from execution.
public_boundary_note: This is a public example shape. It is not the HaleES production contract engine.
